revision.comment: Changed text to sentence format. This matches how [[Template:Commons category]] is formatted. Please revert back if strongly opposed.
revision.text: {{sister project |project=wikisource |text=Wikisource has several original texts related to '''''[[Wikisource:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}]]'''''. }}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
